name: Fettucini Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup swiss or Gruyere cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1) Cook fettuccine to your desired state of doneness. Drain.
2) Melt butter over low heat in a large skillet or sauté pan.
3) Add the cooked fettuccine and toss well until coated with the melted butter.
4) Gradually add the grated cheeses, stirring gently until fully melted and combined.
5) Stir in the heavy cream and pepper to taste.
6) Remove the skillet from heat. Serve immediately for best results.
This recipe provides a creamy, comforting dish that is perfect for serving guests. For an enhanced texture, you may adjust the amount of cream as needed. Accompany the fettuccine Alfredo with a simple tossed salad and garlic bread for a complete, elegant meal.
